title: Smp PVP Essential
description: This texturepack you need to get better at Smp PvP
body:
## Content
**This texturepack has every essentials for pvp and smp pvp**
- **Example : side-shield or low fire and no eating particles**

##  Others with this texturepack
**My friend went from LT4 to LT3 because of this texturepack**
- **You will improve or be a SMP Pvp master**

## Settings
- **1. Set paricles to decreased**
- **2. Use [Fabulously Optimized Modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/1KVo5zza)**
- **3. Use PvP mods : [PvP mods which you need(video)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CIHYNnrRk40)**

## Other stuff
**I will make a own FPS and PvP modpack**

## Join my discord server
- **Why?**: Report bugs or give ideas
- Link: [Click here](https://discord.gg/qVu49UHk7)
